name: 06 — Mono Webhook Enrichment (Mono → AI categorize → budget alert)

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ABS(amount) / 100.0), 0)::numeric AS monthly_spent FROM mono_transaction WHERE user_id = '{{ $('Mono Webhook').item.json.body.user_id }}' AND time >= date_trunc('month', NOW()) AND amount < 0;

parameters.text:
=💸 *Budget alert*

Monthly spending: ₴{{ Math.round($json.monthly_spent) }}
Threshold: ₴15,000

Latest: {{ $('Mono Webhook').item.json.body.data.description }} (₴{{ Math.abs($('Mono Webhook').item.json.body.data.amount / 100) }})
AI category: *{{ $('Parse AI response').item.json.category }}* ({{ Math.round($('Parse AI response').item.json.confidence * 100) }}%)
